name: Sana — Engineering Manager partnering with product

goals: receive specs her team can actually build from
trace every story back to a reason
frustrations: BRDs arrive as prose walls with no acceptance criteria
PMs regenerate documents and nobody tells engineering
profile.behaviour: Evaluates through her team's eyes: would a mid-level engineer understand this story? Checks whether acceptance criteria are testable.
profile.preferredWorkflow: stories with points and testable AC, visible staleness warnings, Gherkin she can hand to QA
profile.budgetSensitivity: medium — team tooling budget exists, needs to beat 'we already have Jira'
profile.decisionStyle: trials with one squad for a sprint; adopts if the team asks to keep it
expectedFeatures: stories with acceptance criteria and points
